name: list_buckets
description: List all R2 storage buckets in your Cloudflare account. Returns the name, creation date, and location for each bucket. Supports pagination with cursor and optional name prefix filtering.

parameters.name: account_id
parameters.description: Your Cloudflare account ID. This is a path parameter.

parameters.name: name_contains
parameters.description: Optional filter to only return buckets whose name contains this substring.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of buckets to return per page (default: 20, max: 1000).

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response to get the next page of results.
